hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q 'backend/' && cd /Users/shuhei.watanabe/private/claude-memory-manager/backend && uv run --with ruff ruff check --fix . && uv run --with ruff ruff format . && uv run pytest; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q 'frontend/' && cd /Users/shuhei.watanabe/private/claude-memory-manager/frontend && npm run lint && npm run test; } 2>/dev/null || true
